dictionary-meaning.בְּרֵאשִׁית: ROOT: ראשׁ; CATEGORY: Noun/Preposition; CORE: In the absolute and uncaused beginning. DOMAIN: Origin; commencement. ETYMOLOGY: From rosh (head). DOMAIN_TYPE: Ontological/Temporal; COGNATES: None; INTENSITY: Absolute.
dictionary-meaning.בָּרָא: ROOT: ברא; CATEGORY: Verb; CORE: Created from nothing and perfectly organized. DOMAIN: To shape; form; create. ETYMOLOGY: Primary root for creation. DOMAIN_TYPE: Creative/Sovereign; COGNATES: None; INTENSITY: Absolute.
dictionary-meaning.אֱלֹהִים: ROOT: אלה; CATEGORY: Noun; CORE: The Sovereign Creator. DOMAIN: God; magistrates; supreme power. ETYMOLOGY: Plural of majesty. DOMAIN_TYPE: Ontological/Legal; COGNATES: None; INTENSITY: Absolute.

dictionary-meaning.תֹ֨הוּ֙: ROOT: תהה; CATEGORY: Noun; CORE: Formless; structural void; chaotic potential. DOMAIN: Chaos/Void. ETYMOLOGY: Primary root. DOMAIN_TYPE: Ontological; COGNATES: None; INTENSITY: High-Grade.
dictionary-meaning.וָבֹ֔הוּ: ROOT: בהה; CATEGORY: Noun; CORE: Empty; content void; desolate. DOMAIN: Desolation. ETYMOLOGY: Primary root. DOMAIN_TYPE: Ontological; COGNATES: None; INTENSITY: High-Grade.
dictionary-meaning.מְרַחֶ֖פֶת: ROOT: רחף; CATEGORY: Verb (Piel Participle); CORE: Vibrantly hovering; brooding; high-intensity kinetic activation. DOMAIN: Motion/Creation. ETYMOLOGY: Primary root. DOMAIN_TYPE: Creative; COGNATES: None; INTENSITY: Absolute.
